name: dependency-risk-auditor
description: Joins GitHub + OSV + npm registry via Coral SQL to score every dependency in a repo as healthy / watch / danger.

scripts.coral:lint: coral source lint ./sources/osv.yaml && coral source lint ./sources/npm.yaml && coral source lint ./sources/npm_downloads.yaml
scripts.coral:add: coral source add --file ./sources/osv.yaml && coral source add --file ./sources/npm.yaml && coral source add --file ./sources/npm_downloads.yaml
scripts.coral:test: coral source test osv && coral source test npm && coral source test npm_downloads
